name: lattice
description: A marketplace of composable AI skills covering the full software delivery lifecycle — from requirements and design through implementation, testing, and review. Each plugin targets a specific SDLC role: backend engineers, frontend engineers, QA, business analysts, and more.

plugins.name: lattice
plugins.description: Composable AI skills covering the full software delivery lifecycle — for backend engineers, frontend engineers, QA, BAs, and more. Install once, invoke the skills you need.
